props.name: children
props.description: The trigger, popover, and optional close elements.

props.name: id
props.description: The id used to associate the trigger with the popover.

props.name: popover
props.description: Sets the native popover behavior. Auto and hint popovers support light dismiss, while manual popovers must be dismissed explicitly.

props.name: render
props.description: Composes the trigger props and ref with a custom button component.

props.name: children
props.description: The content of the button that toggles the popover.

props.name: render
props.description: Replaces the default popover element or composes it with another component.

props.name: children
props.description: The content displayed in the popover, including an optional close control.

props.name: render
props.description: Composes the close props and ref with a custom button component.

props.name: children
props.description: The content of the button that closes the popover.
